summary: Post-migration regression (CRA/CRACO -> Vite). Verified backend + frontend end-to-end. Backend pytest suite (test_rentorax_flow.py + test_phase2.py) is 37/37 PASS. Vite production build succeeds (yarn build => build/index.html + assets, 9.3s, exit 0). Dev server (supervisor `yarn start` => vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000) serves HTTP 200 with /src/main.jsx module and #root div. External preview URL renders the landing page identically (RentoraX logo, hero 'Collect rent and manage property in Nigeria from anywhere.', Get started CTA, feature grid, tenant portal card). Super Admin login via data-testid inputs succeeds and redirects to /admin — Platform overview renders with stat cards (Total Landlords, Properties, Units, Tenants, Caretakers, Active Landlords, Monthly Revenue, Yearly Revenue) and Audit Trail. Direct navigation to /admin/landlords, /admin/announcements, /admin/activity loads without errors. Unauthenticated access to /admin/landlords correctly redirects to /login. process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is properly wired via Vite `define` — axios calls resolve to the correct backend and return 200 (verified via backend suite hitting the same public URL).
critical_code_review_comments: vite.config.js: `define: process.env = JSON.stringify(clientEnv)` correctly exposes REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Note: this replaces the entire `process.env` object at build time (any other process.env.X reference will become undefined). Acceptable for CRA-compat since only REACT_APP_* was ever expected client-side.
esbuild loader 'jsx' for all src/*.js works but slightly increases build cost; migration to explicit .jsx extensions would be cleaner long-term (not required now).
Build output: single 994KB JS chunk (280KB gzip). Consider manualChunks/code-splitting in a future pass — not blocking.

Prior Phase-2 issue (unit_history + native <select> assign flow) from iteration_3 is unrelated to this migration and remains as documented; test_phase2 now passes 18/18 in this run, which suggests the earlier fix landed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for tested regression flows (landing, login, admin dashboard, routes, auth-guard)

seed_data_creation: Only pytest self-created + self-cleaned test landlords.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vite migration is stable. Supervisor's frontend program runs `yarn start` -> `vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000`. Production build outputs to /app/frontend/build. index.html lives at repo root (not public/). Entry is src/main.jsx. All existing data-testids preserved. Console shows expected 401s on /api/auth/me before login (not a bug).
